webservice.description: Returns the authenticated user's current credit balance, tier, billing schedule, and reload policy
webservice.auth: Bearer token required — returns 401 if missing or invalid

outputs.credits_usd: float — current credit balance in USD (>= 0)
outputs.next_billing_date: string — ISO 8601 date of next charge
outputs.auto_reload: boolean — whether credits auto-reload when depleted

guarantees: Returns 401 if Authorization header is missing
Returns 401 if Bearer token is invalid or expired
credits_usd is always >= 0 (never negative in response)
tier is always one of: free, dragon, enterprise
Response time < 2s (cached from DB, no LLM in path)
owasp_guarantees: No token → 401 (not 200 with another user's data)
User A's token cannot access User B's credits

frontend_dependencies: web/home.html → credits badge in top nav
evidence_notes: CLAUDE.md fail-closed rule: No LLM call without credits. This endpoint is the credits gate. Kent Beck: test what you fear most first — unauthenticated access to billing data.
